blocks.name: 切换标签页
blocks.template: 浏览器{{_browser}}通过{{switchType}}切换标签页
blocks.desc: 切换到添加窗口标签页

inputs.name: excepiton_err_msg
inputs.value: 服务渠道-切换到添加窗口标签页失败

inputs.name: excepiton_err_msg
inputs.value: 服务渠道-输入窗口名称失败

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import pyperclip
pyperclip.copy(办事窗口['name'])
suc=sendiRPA.Browser.setText(_browser=glv["hWeb"], xpath=sendiRPA.createXpath(xpath="//div[text()='新建窗口']/..//label[text()='窗口名称']/following-sibling::div//input",iframe=[]), _text='', is_encrypt=False, is_addinput=False, delayBefore=0, delayAfter=0, continue_On_Failure=True, _timeout=1)
try:
    ele = hWeb.find_element(By.XPATH, "//div[text()='新建窗口']/..//label[text()='窗口名称']/following-sibling::div//input")
    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("窗口名称输入成功", exc_info=True)
except Exception as e:
    logger.info("窗口名称输入失败", exc_info=True)

inputs.value: 服务渠道-获取网页已存指尖数组失败

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
已存渠道数组 = []

for item in 网页已存指尖数组:
    已存渠道数组.append(str(item[1])+str(item[2])+str(item[3]))
index = len(已存渠道数组)
